name: restaurant back-office teams processing 10-20 payrolls/month tool
description: For restaurant back-office teams processing 10-20 payrolls/month, manual payroll processing causes late payments to staff. We automate payroll instead of manual payroll processing using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: manual payroll processing leads to errors and delays
